payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or whether the earlier memory should be corrected.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement uses the same name as an existing memory but asserts an incompatible family relationship; it may refer to the same Sara or a different person named Sara.

details: Conflict requires user clarification before updating relationship memory.

repair_options: Confirm the same Sara is your daughter and reject the niece statement.
Correct the existing memory so Sara is your niece instead of your daughter.
Create a separate Sara entity for a different person who is your niece.
Mark both statements as uncertain until clarified.
